headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://connect.facebook.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://www.facebook.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.facebook.com https://connect.facebook.net; font-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'
